name: INOVIO PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
summary: Inovio Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company. The provided filing excerpt is an auditor consent (Exhibit 23.1) from Ernst & Young LLP rather than a business description, so specific product and operational details are not available from this text. The company maintains multiple equity incentive plans including the 2007 Omnibus Incentive Plan, 2016 Omnibus Incentive Plan, 2022 Inducement Plan, and 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan.
